title: Convenient Malum
description: Convenient Malum is a practical mod that adds some useful features to the Malum mod.
body:
Have you ever had this experience? Combining **Malum** and **Iron Spell** results in a backpack full of essences. Even with an Essence Pouch, those stacks of essences take up space and are practically useless.

That's why this mod adds a **Conversion Pouch**—when you place essences inside, they are converted into experience points.

The amount of experience gained per essence type:
Sacred → 4
Corrupt → 5
Arcane → 5
Eldritch → 6
Earth → 6
Infernal → 6
Zephyr → 5
Aqua → 8
Umbral → 22

![Bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40df4f44e0c0c67203cd1626d99d4ee9d74f93f6.png)


![Bag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/906fb72e79e60c80a2ff13724a072203c42ad95b_0.webp)
